must_detect.matched_text:
Proposed term sheet: Redgum Capital Partners Unit Trust (Investor) to acquire up to 60% of Kestrel Harbour Technologies Pty Ltd (Target) by a A$18.0m placement and call option over remaining shares via a members’ scheme under Australian law, with Target retaining day-to-day operations.  
Price and funding: A$3.20 per new ordinary share; option strike A$3.80; funding from Investor’s internal reserves and a subordinated note issued by Bottlebrush Bridge Finance No. 1 Pty Ltd; completion to occur T+3 business days after satisfaction of conditions.  
Conditions precedent: Australian board approvals, foreign investment consent where applicable, no material adverse change (MAC) other than industry-wide events, seasonal revenue trends or changes in accounting standards; for clarity, a soft FY Q1 run-rate is not a MAC and this sentence is not a material adverse change.  
Regulatory and disclosure: Target to comply with continuous disclosure and listing rule obligations under Australian market practice; no announcement until cleared by Target’s Chair and Investor; all parties acknowledge receipt of non-public financial projections and will observe trading restrictions under Australian securities law.  
Use of proceeds: growth capex for “KHT ReefLink v2” product rollout, repayment of A$2.5m working capital facility, and recruitment of two senior engineers; no funds to be used for dividends or related-party payments without consent.  
Key person and employment matters: Mr. Rowan Tse (DOB 02/05/1987), Chief Financial Officer of the Target, based Surry Hills NSW 2010, will remain engaged under his existing contract; device tag KHT-CFO-MBP-8912 and session URL https://portal.kht.example/s?k=c2Vzc2lkPUFVLTQ3OTE linked to finance approvals; internal account A U - 9 8 2 1 - 4 4 5 - 0 7 noted for placement proceeds reconciliation.  
Operational logistics: Mr. Tse’s fit-for-work clearance (no diagnoses disclosed) is on file for a Pilbara WA site visit scheduled 14/08; travel costs reimbursed per Target policy; credit-check consent record CC-1 9 4 8 2 is acknowledged for vendor finance onboarding.  
Separated weak identifiers (not linked to a named person): DOB 1979-11-29, postcode 3000, device ref ac:1 1:b2:c3:dd:44, account AU-111-222-333; these generic demographics and codes are not, on their own, identifying.  
Covenants and warranties: customary Australian warranties for title, capacity, IP ownership, data security, and no undisclosed encumbrances; audit rights for Investor for 18 months post-completion; standard privacy compliance wording applies.
